content: Add RawDiscoveryRecord model + Alembic migration 0003 (id, source_run_id, source_name, raw_payload, normalized_payload, discovery_status, confidence_band, business_id/duplicate_of, error_message, denormalized filter fields, archived_at, indexes)
Add director-based dedup as 4th rule in pipeline.find_duplicate_v2
Refactor discovery_router._execute_run to persist raw payloads up-front and update per-record status (new/processed/duplicate/failed) throughout pipeline
Build new routes: GET /raw-records (paginated, filtered), GET /raw-records/{id}, POST /retry, POST /reprocess, GET /export (CSV), GET /source-quality analytics
Add schedule presets endpoint + retention cleanup APScheduler job (archive 180d, delete 365d)
Frontend: build DiscoveryRecords.jsx page with table, status badges, filters (source/date/status/city), row actions (retry/reprocess/view raw modal), source quality cards, export button
Frontend: add schedule preset dropdown to Discovery source admin UI
Add nav link, wire route, run lint, smoke test, then call testing_agent
